failure_catalog.summary: The requested action crosses an approval boundary that should be resolved before mutation.
next_actions: State the exact mutation that needs approval.
Keep preview-only steps separate from execution.
Pause mutation until the approval state is explicit.

failure_catalog.summary: The canonical doc, runbook, or authority surface is unclear enough that composition would drift.
next_actions: Name the files in tension.
Decide which surface is authoritative for the target concern.
Trim summary docs so they point at canon instead of replacing it.

failure_catalog.summary: The domain seam or core-vs-edge line is fuzzy enough that the route would widen during execution.
next_actions: Map the boundary and its consumers.
Name what belongs in the core versus adapters.
Resume the route only once the seam is reviewable.

failure_catalog.summary: A meaningful preview or inspect-only seam exists and should be taken before mutation.
next_actions: Run or plan the smallest bounded preview.
State what the preview does and does not prove.
Require one explicit confirmation before the real mutation.

failure_catalog.summary: The local environment is not stable enough to trust the current verification result.
next_actions: Return to the canonical startup surface.
Bring up the smallest viable stack.
Record blockers and missing prerequisites before further mutation.

failure_catalog.summary: The route moved forward, but the verification surface is too weak to trust the result.
next_actions: Name the missing boundary or invariant check.
Add the smallest explicit test or audit that tightens confidence.
Report what remains unverified if no bounded check is available.

failure_catalog.summary: Behavioral properties are not explicit enough to protect a structural refactor.
next_actions: Name the behavior that must survive the change.
Write or update the broad property checks first.
Resume refactor after invariant coverage is explicit.

failure_catalog.summary: The route is drifting toward mutation without a credible rollback or recovery story.
next_actions: State the rollback or recovery path before apply.
Reduce the change surface until rollback is reviewable.
Avoid bundling unrelated cleanup into the same mutation.

failure_catalog.summary: The result is useful, but it still contains detail that should be sanitized before it travels.
next_actions: Strip secrets, internal hostnames, and unstable identifiers.
Keep the technical meaning while removing sensitive detail.
Verify the redacted output still answers the user-facing question.

failure_catalog.summary: The task is safer in an isolated worktree or equivalent sandbox than in the active workspace.
next_actions: Move the task into a dedicated worktree when available.
Keep the execution bounded and reversible.
Return only the distilled result to the main thread.

failure_catalog.summary: Compaction or context loss means the route should be rehydrated from explicit artifacts before continuing.
next_actions: Use the compact handoff packet and return anchors.
Reactivate the currently relevant skill before resuming.
Restate the current stage, unresolved risks, and next explicit verification step.

subagent_recipes.name: boundary-contract-split
subagent_recipes.description: Split boundary analysis from contract verification so the main thread keeps only distilled structural conclusions.
when_to_use: too much exploratory output in the main thread

roles.deliverable: context map, interfaces, and core-vs-edge calls
boundary contract assumptions and invariant candidates

subagent_recipes.caution: Spawn explicitly only when the split is clean and bounded. Merge back ledgers and assumptions, not raw exploration logs.

subagent_recipes.name: local-stack-triage
subagent_recipes.description: Separate docs discovery from runtime bring-up when startup noise threatens the main thread.
when_to_use: docs and environment both look suspicious

roles.deliverable: bounded startup attempt and blocker list

subagent_recipes.caution: Do not let the bring-up split widen into unrelated cleanup or implicit infrastructure mutation.

subagent_recipes.name: invariant-audit-swarm
subagent_recipes.description: Split property design from coverage auditing so the refactor thread keeps only the invariant ledger.

roles.deliverable: which invariants are covered, missing, or weak

subagent_recipes.caution: Use this split only when the outputs can be merged as short ledgers rather than parallel raw traces.

subagent_recipes.name: canon-vs-summary-pass
subagent_recipes.description: Separate authority review from outward-facing summary drafting when documentation drift is the main problem.
subagent_recipes.caution: The summary split should reflect the canonical map; it must not redefine canon.

automation_seeds.name: weekly-doc-drift
automation_seeds.title: Weekly doc drift watch
automation_seeds.prompt: Use $aoa-source-of-truth-check to audit top-level docs for authority drift, summary bloat, or conflicting guidance. Do not mutate by default. Then use $aoa-sanitized-share to produce a short shareable drift report with canonical file pointers and recommended bounded next steps.

automation_seeds.name: guarded-infra-preview
automation_seeds.title: Guarded infra preview
automation_seeds.schedule_hint: manual or scheduled after config drift alerts
automation_seeds.prompt: Use $aoa-approval-gate-check to classify whether the requested infrastructure action is approved as stated. If a preview path exists, use $aoa-dry-run-first and stop before mutation. Only if authority already exists and the task remains bounded, use $aoa-safe-infra-change to recommend the smallest next step. Always report rollback notes and residual risk.

automation_seeds.name: local-stack-health-check
automation_seeds.title: Local stack health check
automation_seeds.prompt: Use $aoa-source-of-truth-check to locate the canonical startup and dependency docs, then use $aoa-local-stack-bringup to verify the smallest viable local stack on current HEAD. If blockers appear, stop at the bounded bring-up seam and use $aoa-sanitized-share to prepare a concise blocker report.

automation_seeds.name: decision-brief
automation_seeds.title: Decision brief after notable changes
automation_seeds.schedule_hint: after a set of notable merges
automation_seeds.prompt: Use $aoa-adr-write to capture any meaningful architectural or workflow decisions implied by recent merged work. Then use $aoa-sanitized-share to produce a brief shareable note that preserves rationale and tradeoffs without leaking internal detail.
